text:
From offsite (http://pypi.python.org/pypi/MyghtyUtils):
"""
MyghtyUtils has been merged into Beaker, where the latest version of its functionality is available. The MyghtyUtils project itself is no longer maintained and is effectively retired.
"""

It's unmaintained, nobody in the tree depends on that. So it's safe to mark it deprecated and remove in a month. User should be suggested to use www/py-beaker instead.
